name: PREFAIL: Identifying Precursors to Failures in Robotic Lift-and-Place Tasks to Improve Task Execution Performance
summary: arXiv:2607.16921v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Non-prehensile manipulation enables flexible material handling with part carriers, but friction-based support makes high-speed motions failure-pron...
description: arXiv:2607.16921v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Non-prehensile manipulation enables flexible material handling with part carriers, but friction-based support makes high-speed motions failure-prone, while slower operation increases cycle time. Proactive failure prediction is therefore essential for efficient and reliable performance, yet existing approaches remain limited by key constraints, i...
author: Zeyu Shangguan, Rajas Chitale, Rutvik Patel, Satyandra K. Gupta, Daniel Seita
